name: Destreza
description: Elevate martial combat into an art form with this Tenno rapier.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Elevate martial combat into an art form with this Tenno rapier.

components.name: Nitain Extract
components.description:
Each vial is produced by the painstaking expression of billions of rare, ocean-vent dwelling microorganisms.

Location: Nightwave Cred Offerings

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with several one-handed Melee weapons not functioning (as an accidental result of the Glaive changes). Weapons included: most Machetes, Plasma Sword, Destreza and Destreza Prime, Sheev, and Scoliac.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Titania Prime 27.3.6
patchlogs.changes: Replaced Steel Meridian’s Sacrifice of Destreza Prime Handle with Redeemer Prime Blade.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Prova series, Kreska, Sheev, Machete series, Mire, Scoliac, Kama, Nami Solo, Plasma Sword and Destreza series not consuming Combo Counter on Heavy Attack.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Chroma Prime 23.9.0 + 23.9.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
Chroma Prime, Gram Prime, and Rubico Prime Relics have replaced all exclusive locations of Limbo Prime, Destreza Prime, and Pyrana Prime Relics:
*Limbo Prime, Destreza Prime, and Pyrana Prime Relics are also still out in the wild, just not in exclusive spots like Bounties or Onslaught.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Destreza Prime missing its Icon.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.3 - Limbo Prime
patchlogs.changes: Limbo Prime, Destreza Prime, and Pyrana Prime Relics have replaced all locations of Zephyr Prime, Tiberon Prime, and Kronen Prime Relics:

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being unable to craft the Destreza. This also fixes other items requiring Argon Crystals not being craftable.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.3.1 + 18.3.1.1
patchlogs.changes:
Removed the knockdown from the Destreza’s quick melee slam in Conclave.
Cleaned up the Destreza’s charge attacks to make sure that slide and charge attack animations are smoother.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Destreza clipping through the player’s head while blocking during a slide.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes:
The Destreza has arrived!  Elevate martial combat into an art form with this Tenno rapier!
Add the Destreza to your Arsenal today by visiting the Warframe Market.
